attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
	WIP.INV_TRANS_ID,
	COALESCE(WIP.QTY_ON_HAND,0),
	COALESCE(WIP.COMMITTED_QTY,0),
	COALESCE(WIP.ON_ORDER_QTY,0),
	COALESCE(WIP.IN_TRANSIT_QTY,0),
	NPRG.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT,
	PRD.ITEM_KEY AS PRODUCT_KEY,
	WIP.INVENTORY_LOCATION AS DISTI_REPORTED_DISTI_WHSE_NUM,
	COALESCE(WIP.REPORTED_CURRENCY_CODE,'=')  AS LOCAL_CURRENCY_CD,
	COALESCE(WIP.CISCO_GPL_UNIT_PRICE,0.0000000) AS GLBL_PRC_LST_UNIT_PRC_USD_AMT,
	COALESCE(WIP.CISCO_GPL_UNIT_PRICE_LC,0.0000000) AS GLBL_PRC_LST_UNIT_PRC_LCL_AMT,
	COALESCE(WIP.CISCO_WPL_UNIT_PRICE,0.0000000) AS WHLSL_PRC_LST_UNIT_PRC_USD_AMT,
	COALESCE(WIP.CISCO_WPL_UNIT_PRICE_LC,0.0000000) AS WHLSL_PRC_LST_UNIT_PRC_LCL_AMT,
	COALESCE(WIP.REPORTED_UNIT_PRICE_USD,0.0000000) AS DISTI_RPRTD_UNIT_PRC_USD_AMT,
	COALESCE(WIP.REPORTED_UNIT_PRICE_LC,0.0000000) AS DISTI_RPRTD_UNIT_PRC_LCL_AMT,
	CASE 
		WHEN DWH.DISTRIBUTOR_WAREHOUSE_NUM IS NOT NULL THEN
			DWH.DISTRIBUTOR_WAREHOUSE_NUM
		ELSE '-999'
		END AS DISTRIBUTOR_WAREHOUSE_NUM,
	COALESCE(WIP.VALUATION_PRICE,0.0000000) AS VALUATION_PRICE_USD_AMT,
	COALESCE(WIP.VALUATION_PRICE_LC,0.0000000) AS VALUATION_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT,
	COALESCE(WIP.QTY_ON_HAND * WIP.VALUATION_PRICE,0.0000000) AS INVNTRY_VALUATION_USD_AMT,  
	COALESCE((WIP.IN_TRANSIT_QTY * WIP.VALUATION_PRICE),0.0000000) AS INVNTRY_IN_TRNST_VLTN_USD_AMT,
	WIP.SRC_BATCH_ID,
	WIP.INVENTORY_DATE,
	WIP.INV_TYPE,
	COALESCE(WIP.SECOND_SOURCE,'='),
	COALESCE(WIP.BACKORDER_QTY,0),
	COALESCE(CNT.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,'=') AS SECOND_SOURCE_ISO_COUNTRY_CD, 
	WIP.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
	WIP.VENDOR_PART_NO,
	WIP.CONVERSION_RATE,
	COALESCE(WIP.AVERAGE_SELLING_PRICE,0.0000000) AS AVG_SELLING_PRICE_USD_AMT,
	COALESCE(WIP.AVERAGE_SELLING_PRICE_LC,0.0000000) AS AVG_SELLING_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT,
	COALESCE(WIP.VALUATION_PRICE_SOURCE,'=') AS VALUATION_PRICE_SOURCE_CD,
	WIP.ACTIVE_FLAG,
	0  AS CISCO_TO_DISTI_IN_TRANSIT_QTY,
	USER,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
	USER,
    CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
    OBSOLETE_QUANTITY,                     
	STOCK_QTY  ,
	/*Below columns are added as part of Q1FY17*/
	COALESCE(WIP.QTY_ON_HAND * WIP.VALUATION_PRICE_LC,0.0000000) AS INVENTORY_VALUATION_LOCAL_AMT,
	COALESCE(WIP.QTY_ON_HAND * COALESCE(WIP.AVG_PRICE_LC,0.0000000),0.0000000) AS INVENTORY_OM_AVG_LOCAL_AMT,
	COALESCE(WIP.QTY_ON_HAND * COALESCE(COALESCE(WIP.AVG_PRICE_LC,0.0000000) * WIP.CONVERSION_RATE,0.0000000),0.0000000) AS INVENTORY_OM_AVG_USD_AMT,
	COALESCE(WIP.AVG_PRICE_LC,0.0000000) AS OM_AVG_LOCAL_AMT,
   	COALESCE(COALESCE(WIP.AVG_PRICE_LC,0.0000000) * WIP.CONVERSION_RATE,0.0000000)  AS  OM_AVG_USD_AMT
		
FROM $$STGDB.ST_WIPS_INV_TRANS WIP
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_ORIGINATOR_ORG NPRG
ON ( WIP.SOURCE_PROFILE_ID=NPRG.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT )
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT PRD
ON (PRD.BK_PRODUCT_ID = WIP.MFG_PART_NO )
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_BATCH NBAT
ON ( NBAT.BATCH_ID_INT = WIP.SRC_BATCH_ID )
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DISTRIBUTOR_WAREHOUSE DWH
ON (DWH.BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT=WIP.SOURCE_PROFILE_ID
AND DWH.DISTRIBUTOR_WAREHOUSE_NUM =WIP.INVENTORY_LOCATION)
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY CNT
ON (CNT.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE=WIP.SECOND_SOURCE_COUNTRY_CODE)

SELECT 
 DISTI_INVNTRY_TRX_LINE_ID_INT,
ON_HAND_QTY,
COMMITTED_QTY,
ON_ORDER_QTY,
DISTI_REPORTED_IN_TRANSIT_QTY,
BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT,
PRODUCT_KEY,
DISTI_REPORTED_DISTI_WHSE_NUM,
LOCAL_CURRENCY_CD,
GLBL_PRC_LST_UNIT_PRC_USD_AMT,
GLBL_PRC_LST_UNIT_PRC_LCL_AMT ,
WHLSL_PRC_LST_UNIT_PRC_USD_AMT,
WHLSL_PRC_LST_UNIT_PRC_LCL_AMT,
DISTI_RPRTD_UNIT_PRC_USD_AMT,
DISTI_RPRTD_UNIT_PRC_LCL_AMT,
DISTRIBUTOR_WAREHOUSE_NUM,
VALUATION_PRICE_USD_AMT,
VALUATION_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT,
INVNTRY_VALUATION_USD_AMT,
INVNTRY_IN_TRNST_VLTN_USD_AMT,
BATCH_ID_INT,
INVENTORY_AS_OF_DT,
INVENTORY_TYPE_CD ,
SECOND_SOURCE_FLG,
BACKORDERED_QTY,
SECOND_SOURCE_ISO_COUNTRY_CD,
LAST_UPDATE_DTM,
VENDOR_PART_NUM,
LOCAL_TO_USD_CURR_CONV_RT,
AVG_SELLING_PRICE_USD_AMT,
AVG_SELLING_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT,
VALUATION_PRICE_SOURCE_CD,
ACTIVE_FLG,
CISCO_TO_DISTI_IN_TRANSIT_QTY,
EDW_CREATE_USER,
EDW_CREATE_DTM ,
EDW_UPDATE_USER,
EDW_UPDATE_DTM ,
'N',
OBSOLETE_QTY,                     
DISTRIBUTOR_RPRTD_IN_STOCK_QTY,  
/*Below columns are added as part of Q2FY17*/
INVENTORY_VALUATION_LOCAL_AMT,
INVENTORY_OM_AVG_LOCAL_AMT,
INVENTORY_OM_AVG_USD_AMT,
OM_AVG_LOCAL_AMT,
OM_AVG_USD_AMT
 FROM $$STGDB.WI_WIPS_INV_TRANS_INCR
 
 UNION ALL
 
 SELECT 
DISTI_INVNTRY_TRX_LINE_ID_INT,
ON_HAND_QTY,
COMMITTED_QTY,
ON_ORDER_QTY,
DISTI_REPORTED_IN_TRANSIT_QTY,
BK_WIPS_ORIGINATOR_ID_INT,
PRODUCT_KEY,
DISTI_REPORTED_DISTI_WHSE_NUM,
LOCAL_CURRENCY_CD,
GLBL_PRC_LST_UNIT_PRC_USD_AMT,
GLBL_PRC_LST_UNIT_PRC_LCL_AMT ,
WHLSL_PRC_LST_UNIT_PRC_USD_AMT,
WHLSL_PRC_LST_UNIT_PRC_LCL_AMT,
DISTI_RPRTD_UNIT_PRC_USD_AMT,
DISTI_RPRTD_UNIT_PRC_LCL_AMT,
DISTRIBUTOR_WAREHOUSE_NUM,
VALUATION_PRICE_USD_AMT,
VALUATION_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT,
INVNTRY_VALUATION_USD_AMT,
INVNTRY_IN_TRNST_VLTN_USD_AMT,
BATCH_ID_INT,
INVENTORY_AS_OF_DT,
INVENTORY_TYPE_CD ,
SECOND_SOURCE_FLG,
BACKORDERED_QTY,
SECOND_SOURCE_ISO_COUNTRY_CD,
LAST_UPDATE_DTM,
VENDOR_PART_NUM,
LOCAL_TO_USD_CURR_CONV_RT,
AVG_SELLING_PRICE_USD_AMT,
AVG_SELLING_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT,
VALUATION_PRICE_SOURCE_CD,
ACTIVE_FLG,
CISCO_TO_DISTI_IN_TRANSIT_QTY,
EDW_CREATE_USER,
EDW_CREATE_DTM ,
EDW_UPDATE_USER,
EDW_UPDATE_DTM ,
'E',
OBSOLETE_QTY,                 
DISTRIBUTOR_RPRTD_IN_STOCK_QTY,
/*Below columns are added as part of Q2FY17*/
INVENTORY_VALUATION_LOCAL_AMT,
INVENTORY_OM_AVG_LOCAL_AMT,
INVENTORY_OM_AVG_USD_AMT,
OM_AVG_LOCAL_AMT,
OM_AVG_USD_AMT
FROM $$STGDB.WI_WIPS_INV_TRANS_EXT EXT
WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_WIPS_INV_TRANS_INCR INC
WHERE EXT.DISTI_INVNTRY_TRX_LINE_ID_INT = INC.DISTI_INVNTRY_TRX_LINE_ID_INT )
